name: elasticsearch-py (Official Python Elasticsearch Client)

auth.notes: Elasticsearch API keys or username/password; TLS

agent_readiness.notes: Official Elasticsearch Python client. from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch. es = Elasticsearch('https://localhost:9200', api_key='key'). es.index(index='logs', document={...}). es.search(index='logs', query={'match': {'field': 'value'}}). Bulk API: helpers.bulk(es, docs). AsyncElasticsearch for async. helpers.scan() for scroll through large results. Elasticsearch DSL-PY for higher-level query building. KNN vector search. Async client. Type hints for query DSL.

gotchas: v8 client not compatible with Elasticsearch 7.x without version override
Elasticsearch DSL-py is separate package for ORM-like interface
Bulk indexing performance requires tweaking batch sizes
KNN vector search requires specific index mapping setup
best_when: Full-text search with Elasticsearch (logs, documents, products)
Python services integrating with Elasticsearch clusters or Elastic Cloud
Vector search / semantic search with Elasticsearch KNN
Bulk document indexing from Python pipelines
avoid_when: Simple key-value or document storage (MongoDB or Redis simpler)
When OpenSearch is used instead of Elasticsearch (use opensearch-py)
Serverless environments with many connections (use connection pooling carefully)
summary: Official Elasticsearch Python client v8. Elasticsearch(url, api_key=). es.search(), es.index(), es.bulk(). AsyncElasticsearch for async. helpers.bulk() and helpers.scan() for bulk/scroll. Type hints. Elasticsearch DSL-py for higher-level query building. KNN vector search support. Used for search, log analytics, and vector similarity applications.
